examples: However, nationally important numbers of Curlew, Redshank and Golden Plover were also recorded.
The species included the wren, nuthatch, starling and also waterbirds such as the oystercatcher, curlew and redshank.
It said the animals were having a devastating impact on the islands' internationally important populations of wading birds - like the dunlin, lapwing, redshank and snipe - by eating their eggs.
